channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: What is going on with the US and Nato? - BBC

IEA says Iran war will keep the global natural gas market tight for two years - CBS News
Zelenskyy visits Saudi Arabia, Putin weighs G20 attendance - DW.com

Bitcoin stays 'stalled' at $78K as oil threatens new risk-asset squeeze - TradingView
